login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Log in to your account
login.description: Log in to continue to your dashboard

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Create your account
register.description: Create an account to start tracking your nutrition and training
register.success: Registration successful! Check your email to verify your account.
register.successVerify: Check your email to verify your account.

error.usernameRaceCondition: That username was just taken by someone else. Please choose another.

register.usernameHint: Choose a unique name your friends can find you by.
register.passwordHint: Password must be at least 6 characters

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.success: Check your email for instructions on how to reset your password.

resetPassword.invalidDescription: The link may have expired or already been used. Please request a new reset link.
resetPassword.successDescription: You can now log in with your new password. You will be redirected to the login page shortly.
resetPassword.subtitle: Reset your password
resetPassword.cardDescription: Choose a strong password that is at least 6 characters long

toast.invalidLink: The reset link is invalid or has expired

validation.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long

authCallback.successDescription: Your account is now activated. You will be redirected to your dashboard shortly.
authCallback.errorFallback: Could not confirm your email address.
